column1: # Amidala Firmware — 8 MB OTA partition table (ESP32-S3-WROOM-1 N8R2).
# Standard dual-OTA layout: the bootloader alternates between ota_0 and ota_1.
# The Update class (Arduino ESP32) writes the new firmware to the inactive slot;
# on restart the bootloader boots the newly flashed slot.
# Rollback is disabled via sdkconfig.defaults so the bootloader will not revert
# to the previous slot if the app crashes before marking itself valid.
